entry.summary: Order Regarding Response to Motion

entry.title: Entry #33 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: MEMORANDUM in support of Motion to Dismiss/Failure to State a Claim 32 filed by American Petroleum Institute (Fauson, Joel) (Entered: 05/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #32 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: MOTION to dismiss for failure to state a claim by defendant American Petroleum Institute; (Fauson, Joel) (Entered: 05/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #31 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: BRIEF in support of JOINT MOTION to dismiss for failure to state a claim pursuant to Fed R. Civ. P. 12(b)(6)JOINT MOTION to dismiss for lack of jurisdiction pursuant to Fed R. Civ. P. 12(b)(1) 30 filed by Chevron Corporation, Chevron U.S.A., Inc. (McManus, Jennifer) (Entered: 05/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #30 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: JOINT MOTION to dismiss for failure to state a claim pursuant to Fed R. Civ. P. 12(b)(6), JOINT MOTION to dismiss for lack of jurisdiction pursuant to Fed R. Civ. P. 12(b)(1) by defendants Chevron Corporation, Chevron U.S.A., Inc.; (McManus, Jennifer) (Entered: 05/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #29 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: ORDER granting proposed stipulated order 28 ; setting certain word limitations; signed by District Judge Jane M. Beckering (rmw) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #28 in People of the State of Michigan v. BP, P.L.C., 1:26-cv-00254
entry.summary: PROPOSED STIPULATION and ORDER regarding Word Limitations for Briefs in Support of and in Opposition to Defendants' Motion to Dismiss by defendants Chevron Corporation, Chevron U.S.A., Inc. (McManus, Jennifer) (Entered: 04/27/2026)
